entry.title: Sales Return Copy Data
entry.content: i want to copy all billing document data to return sales order when it is punched with reference to billing document except for two particular division out of 22 divisions, apart from enhancement what else can be done?

entry.title: Re: Could you please tell me how to register an order sli...
entry.content:
Hello,

To register an order slip and process it afterwards for direct shipping to the supplier, you can follow these guidelines using SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Relevant Scope Items

For direct shipping to the supplier during ordering, the following SAP S/4HANA scope items are applicable:

1. BD3 - Third-Party Sales Process with Notifications

  • Process Overview: This scope item supports the sales process where customer orders are forwarded to third-party vendors. It involves automatic creation of purchase requisitions for materials to be delivered directly to the end customers by third-party suppliers. The third-party vendors ship goods directly to your customers and invoice them directly.

2. BDK - Third-Party Sales Process without Notifications

  • Process Overview: Similar to BD3, this scope item enables direct ordering of goods from third-party suppliers without shipping notifications. Upon receipt of an invoice from the supplier, the billing amount is updated automatically.

Process Steps

Registration of Order Slip

  1. Create Sales Order: Use the solution order management app to create a sales order. Choose BD3 or BDK scope item depending Solution Order Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2111 on whether shipping notifications are required.

  2. Automatic Purchase Requisition: Upon creating the sales order, a purchase requisition is automatically generated for the required materials.

Processing After Order

  1. Convert to Purchase Order: Convert the purchase requisition into a purchase order for the supplier.

  2. Monitor Shipping and Billing: If using BD3, follow the shipping process; for BDK, monitor the billing amount updates as invoices arrive.

  3. Complete Transaction: Complete the sales billing process as per the updated amounts.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Subject: How to Register Memo-like Items in Sales BOM...
entry.content:
Hello,

To register memo-like text items in sales BOMs that are not related to inventory or pricing, using the ‘Text Item (T)’ category is typically the approach taken. However, as you mentioned, these items may not appear in sales orders when configured this way.

Solution

  1. Use BOM with Item Category Group ERLA:

    • When processing BOMs on the main item level with item category group ERLA, the components serve as text items. Sales - Bills of Material in Sales Documents This ensures that they are included for information purposes without impacting inventory management or pricing.

  2. Configuration Settings:

    • Ensure that the Sales BOM is correctly set up with BOM Usage: 5 and item category group ERLA for the main item.
    • The subitems will be managed as text items, provided that the configuration supports this, although you may need to verify that this setting aligns with the version you are using.

  3. Review SAP Documentation or Notes:

    • Sometimes limitations exist in how BOM items function within the system, especially concerning text-based components. SAP documentation or support notes related to Sales BOM configurations could provide additional insights or alternative approaches to handle these cases.

By leveraging the main item level processing with item category ERLA, it’s possible to incorporate components as text items effectively. If issues persist, consulting specific SAP notes or configurations related to version 2 updates may be beneficial.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

My name is Ayesha Mirza from India. I am an MBA Finance student and passionate about mastering SAP

entry.title: How to Add custom field in XK01/XK02/XK03 in Purchasing view tab
entry.content:
Hi SAP'ns,

I have requirement to add custom field in XK01/XK02/XK03 screen under purchasing view tab. 

No need to click any push button it should display in SAP screen like below picture..

Pls guide me to achieve this.

entry.title: Re: Automatic sending of SalesOrder messages from the S/4...
entry.content:
Hello,

To ensure sales orders in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud are automatically sent to the sales order queue Event Driven Integration with SAP S/4 HANA Cloud u… - SAP Community in SAP Event Mesh, you need to complete the following steps:

1. Configure the Enterprise Event Enablement

  • Navigate to the Enterprise Event Enablement application in your S/4HANA Cloud system.
  • Ensure your user has the necessary permissions, specifically the role SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR.

2. Activate the Outbound Event

  • Add the sales order change event as an outbound event in the Enterprise Event Enablement S/4HANA Cloud Events and SAP BTP Kyma - SAP Community app.
  • The topic should be configured as sap/s4/beh/salesorder/created/v1.

3. Verify Communication Arrangement

  • Check that the communication arrangement for eventing is correctly set up using the scenario SAP_COM_0092, if applicable.
  • Ensure it lists the event mesh as a client for outbound topics.

4. Set Up Event Mesh Queue

  • Within the SAP Event Mesh, ensure the queue salesOrderChangedQueue subscribes to the event sap/s4/beh/salesorder/created/v1.
  • Make sure the queue is correctly configured to handle incoming sales order events.

5. Configure Webhook (Optional)

  • If using a webhook in SAP Event Mesh, ensure proper settings including OAuth2.0 client credentials for security.

6. Integration Suite Configuration

  • Set up the AMQP adapter in your SAP Cloud Integration to retrieve messages from the sales order queue.
  • Ensure that the configuration allows for handling the data content type and formatting (e.g., JSON to XML) for subsequent OData calls.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: LMS purge users from success factors and external users
entry.content:
Hello,
We have a scenario involving purging users coming from SuccessFactors and users registered on learning sites.
We are trying to understand how this scenario should work. I have been reading the documentation, and as far as I understand, for users from SuccessFactors, the purge should be done in the BizX system using the option DRTM Learning Data Purge. For external users, the documents I read seemed to show how to perform this only for native users (i.e., users without EC). They also mention that the termination date is considered for internal users, which makes it confusing. Will the job purge internal users based on the termination date as well?

Does anyone have documentation about these scenarios or experience with this process and could share how it was handled?

Thanks,
Ana

entry.title: Re: Business Data Validation of Custom Reports using Data Transition Validation (DTV) tool
entry.content:
Hi Varun,

At this moment DTV has this limitation, where the user who has added the custom report/reports in the test specification can only execute the reports in both ECC and S/4HANA system.

You are right this limitation is not applicable for SAP standard reports.

Thanks, and Regards

Abhya

Hi all, 

There is an API for calling GETPDF for a billing Document but it only fetches latest PDF whose status has been completed. Is there any way or Filter to fetch the Desired Template by filtering it in S4hana Public cloud.

/sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/GetPDF  

API fo that

entry.title: Re: Defaulting Pick-Up Dates on Freight Units
entry.content:
Hi @SFC 

"Did I misunderstand the use of those fields? Appreciate any pointers to have the dates under Source populated."

For outbound Delivery/ Customer Order/Sales Order - O Means Source means Shipping Point and I means Customer means Destination... Please see example below with data of Freight Unit created from Sales Order, influenced to change date and let us know if any questions.

For inbound delivery, it would be reverse

Details link:

 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/beb00cb0f7ae427a95390679c6c56d41.html

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2486759

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/flexible-pickup-delivery-window-interpretation/ba-p/13496215

Kind Regards,

Ajit

Is there a way to maintain entitlement amount in this case and how to achieve this scenario.

Thanks

entry.title: Link Production Order to SAP CPM Change Request
entry.content:
Hello All, Good day. 

We have a business requirement to enable linking Production Order to a Change Request created in SAP CPM(Commercial Project Management). Necessary configurations have been completed but we are facing issue while assigning "Search Help" for the object type - PRN. 

Code Changes done were similar to how ECN - Change Master object type has been setup in standard. While debugging for the component ECN, the below method is triggered from the class /IAM/CL_INTEGRATION_UTIL and the method SEARCH_OBJECT but We couldn’t implement the same method for the PRN component, as the interface /IAM/IF_QUERY_PRN~FIND_BY_ELEMENTS do not exists.

Has anyone implemented such a scenario in your experience ? If so, we really appreciate your help and comments regarding this. 

SAP Commercial Project Management for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Mass change of Master Recipe usage in SAP Public Clou...
entry.content:
Hello Tiago,

by using standard functionality you can only "Replace Resource".

If you have more complex requirements, please check the following API:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d35113ee62644d3abee1aaec148291d9/4d9ed891a8c547c493e70dbfdcbea7bb.html?locale=en-US

Please check the "Constraint" section to see the restrictions.
I hope this helps. 
Regards Johannes

entry.title: Sub-consolidation with Minimal Cons Groups
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We have a scenario where we need to report on sub-consolidations. We have 200+ Cons Units and a statutory and management view and sub-cons within them.
Where there is a parent holding an investment in a sub, I understand we will need to setup a CG.
However, for just intercompany elims - how do we avoid setting up cons groups for each sub-consolidation sub-grouping?
A simple example: In the statutory view there is CU 1-7 where CU 3 is the parent of 4 & 5. Graphical below.

If we want to report on consolidated 3 group - this would mean that we have to setup CG-A: 1-7; CG-B for 3 4 and 5.
If I run on CG1 and select 3,4,5 or a CU hierarchy included 3 4 and 5, in Group Data Analysis, I believe the result will display consolidated including eliminations for any CU in CG1 not just 3,4,5.
Asking since we are working with Group Reporting 2023 OP FP01
GRDC is not available, and the site updated from EC-CS where Cons Group hierarchies are successfully used to meet this requirement.

Multiply this requirement by sub-cons for both statutory and management (with 5 sub-groups) and the result is many Cons Groups to run consolidation and roll forward every year.
How do we avoid creating all this effort for the users?
They will need to run tasks and reconcile data.

Regards,
Eyal

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content: Hi Xu, All the above steps are standard and we have done them. Since one bill to party has two different sold to, system is consider only first sold to and forgetting second sold to. And determining price of first sold to only in the settlement documents.

entry.title: Fiori Elements - Prerequisites SAPUI5 version
entry.content:
Hello,

We would like to use Fiori Elements.

Is there an overview of which Fiori Elements features are available from which SAPUI5 version?

We encountered an issue because we created a Fiori Elements application and when deploying, we found that for example the component sap.fe.core.BaseController is only available from SAPUI5 1.90.0.

entry.title: Candidate id is not passing from RCM to ONB to EC
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are facing an issue with third-party integration, where the Candidate ID is not passing from RCM to ONB to EC as expected.

Configuration Details:

  • In RCM, the Candidate ID field is present under the Candidate Profile Template.

  • In Onboarding, we have configured the Candidate ID field as Custom String 12 and Custom Long.

  • We are using Recruit-to-Hire Data Mapping to transfer this data from RCM to ONB to EC.

Issue:

Despite the configuration, the Candidate ID is not flowing through the system as required.

Requesting your support to investigate and resolve this at the earliest.

Best regards,
Rajesh

entry.title: Universal Display Hierarchy - Display values on all hierarchy nodes/levels
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

we want to use the UDH for combining two charateristics.

Issue we see ist that only values are displayed when the hierarchy is expaned to the second characteristic but no values on the parent nodes/first charateristic when not expanded.

So in the example of 
Screen Area: Universal Display Hierarchy | SAP Help Portal

We want value also at country level -> yellow mark (especially when not expanded to city level).

What kind of setting is needed for that?
In other queries (that use UDH) it is showing values on all UDH levels.

Thanks for all replies in advance!

Best regards

Axel

entry.title: Course is not moving to learning history after completion
entry.content:
Good day,

We have a course currently assigned to over 200 users. All Learning completion settings are setup correctly, however upon completion of the course, the course does not move to learning history. "Add to history on completion of all content" is checked.

entry.title: Re: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content:
Hello,

I suppose you have activated SBC by mistake. Please deactivate the SBC flag for the checking group:

SPRO

Advanced Available-to-Promise (aATP)
Configuration Activities for Enhanced Check Methods
-> Configure Enhanced Check Methods by Document Purpose

and check again.

--------------

If ABC is not being executed somehow -> please review the checklist of question 1 of KBA 2776851 FAQ: Alternative based Confirmation (ABC) with aATP.

Hope this helps.

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Read archived records from DFKKZP table
entry.content:
Utilities SAP Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable

Hi All,

We have a requirement to read archived entries for payment lots during run time from DFKKZP table and use few table fields for a different process. 

Could you please share, if there is any recommended way to read the archived entries or any SAP standard function module to read archived records from DFKKZP table. 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content:
First of all many thanks for all the input.

We split the PDM a long time ago and every PDM has Shortcuts (only Name/Code) to other models. We have a small default diagram with shortcuts to package diagrams.

Here are my answers to your questions:

  • Do you have similar response times when opening/saving these models on different computers?
    -> We have similar response times when saving the models, but not when opening.
    The only difference is, that we use different virtual machines. All machines/computers use the same PD Version and configuration.
  • Can you try it on good old physical PC?
    -> Unfortunately, there is no possibility to test on an old school PC.
  • Are there any other models opened in the same PD instance?
    Sometimes yes, sometimes no. But it makes no difference.
  • Some PD versions in the past had trouble handling views with recursive SQL query in it? Do you have such objects (Views, Procedures) in your model?
    We have simple views in the model, but as far as I know not with recursive SQL.
  • Can you try saving your model using "Save as new model"?
    Took almost the same time for saving.
  • Do you use any "special" extensions (or definition file modification) attached to those models?
    Yes, we have a extension that all models use, but only two event handlers with a small script. We also have some complex scripts, but those are executed manually.

entry.title: Critical vulnerabilities found in ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 SP01
entry.content:
Hi,

 

we are interested in using SAP's official SAP Container-Image hosted at https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial.

However, we noticed that this image has not been updated in over six months. After scanning it with Trivy, we identified the following critical vulnerabilities:

  1. CVE-2024-52316 - catalina.jar (version 9.0.90)
  2. CVE-2025-24813 - catalina.jar (version 9.0.90)
  3. CVE-2024-24790 - in the proprietary binary /usr/local/bin/abaptrialinit

 

We are likely able to patch the Tomcat-related issues (1 and 2) ourselves by replacing catalina.jar with version 9.0.99, which contains the official security fixes provided by Apache. 
However, regarding CVE-2024-24790, the affected file /usr/local/bin/abaptrialinit is a proprietary binary owned by SAP (and the container's entrypoint). As such, we are unable to patch it ourselves.
Please note that our company security policies prohibit the use of any container image with critical vulnerabilities. Therefore, we kindly request an updated version of the image or guidance on how to mitigate this issue.

This is the scan-report:

 

8f49966c16f3 (sles 15.3)

Total: 0 (CRITICAL: 0)

2025-03-28T08:02:37+01:00	INFO	Table result includes only package filenames. Use '--format json' option to get the full path to the package file.

Java (jar)

Total: 2 (CRITICAL: 2)

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────┬──────────┬────────┬───────────────────┬─────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     Library                      │ Vulnerability  │ Severity │ Status │ Installed Version │      Fixed Version      │                           Title                            │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────┼──────────┼────────┼───────────────────┼─────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ org.apache.tomcat:tomcat-catalina (catalina.jar) │ CVE-2024-52316 │ CRITICAL │ fixed  │ 9.0.90            │ 9.0.96, 10.1.30, 11.0.1 │ tomcat: Apache Tomcat: Authentication bypass when using    │
│                                                  │                │          │        │                   │                         │ Jakarta Authentication API                                 │
│                                                  │                │          │        │                   │                         │ https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/cve-2024-52316                 │
│                                                  ├────────────────┤          │        │                   ├─────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                  │ CVE-2025-24813 │          │        │                   │ 11.0.3, 10.1.35, 9.0.99 │ tomcat: Potential RCE and/or information disclosure and/or │
│                                                  │                │          │        │                   │                         │ information corruption with partial PUT...                 │
│                                                  │                │          │        │                   │                         │ https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/cve-2025-24813                 │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────┴──────────┴────────┴───────────────────┴─────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

usr/local/bin/abaptrialinit (gobinary)

Total: 1 (CRITICAL: 1)

┌─────────┬────────────────┬──────────┬────────┬───────────────────┬─────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Library │ Vulnerability  │ Severity │ Status │ Installed Version │  Fixed Version  │                           Title                            │
├─────────┼────────────────┼──────────┼────────┼───────────────────┼─────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ stdlib  │ CVE-2024-24790 │ CRITICAL │ fixed  │ v1.20.4           │ 1.21.11, 1.22.4 │ golang: net/netip: Unexpected behavior from Is methods for │
│         │                │          │        │                   │                 │ IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses                                 │
│         │                │          │        │                   │                 │ https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/cve-2024-24790                 │
└─────────┴────────────────┴──────────┴────────┴───────────────────┴─────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 

Thank you for your support.

 

Best Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: CI/CPI Suspend/Resume - Undeploy/Redeploy Integration Content
entry.content:
CI/CPI doesn't have "out of the box" Suspend/Resume, it lacks native functionality like SAP PI/PO's Adapter Engine maintenance tasks (1884085 - Suspend/Resume PI Adapter Engine). Does anyone have an elegant way or a tool for mass changes of Un-deploy/Redeploy-ing Integration Content. Maybe a programmatic control via CPI OData API to automate deployment states, or a script. Implementing a custom management, something like conditional processing flags by adding a maintenance mode logic to integration flows and similar is an overkill, hard to maintain and error-prone. What do you use? 

# Suspend via API
PATCH /api/v1/IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts(Id='<flow_id>',Version='Active') Body: {"Deployed": false}
# Resume via API
PATCH /api/v1/IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts(Id='<flow_id>',Version='Active') Body: {"Deployed": true}

#IntegrationManagement
@MortenWittrock (something like CPIManager) 😉

entry.title: BAS Application Modeler broken with Fiori tools 1.17.1
entry.content:
Hello all,

Since the new version 1.17.1 of Fiori tools, the Application Modeler is broken and it it not possible to migrate old projects. After starting the migration, there is a message in the bottom right corner:

I used VS Code to reproduce and switching back to 1.17.0, the migration can be executed. Is there a possibility to revert the Fiori tools in BAS till the bug is fixed?

Thanks,
Thomas

entry.title: Re: Manufacturing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Hi @k_de , 

thanks for reaching out. Best way is to read Peter's blog post for Process Manufacturing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-for-process-manufacturing-last-content/ba-p/13414652

Capability wise you will find all information here: Manufacturing | SAP Help Portal

Sorry, I don't have a comparison between PCE and Public Edition. 

All the best, Markus

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – How to migrate from groups to spaces and pages
entry.content:
Thanks a lot Jocelyn,

Client-specific changes in /UI2/FLP_CUS_CONF were found to take precedence over the cross-client settings in /UI2/FLP_SYS_CONF. It would be ideal if user-level settings for Spaces could be managed directly in SU01.

Thanks,

Jakes

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot generation & Processing by using EWM inspection types in S/4 HANA 1809
entry.content: If you want to control the creation of inspection lot on good receipt, you need to implement the interface IF_EX_MB_DOCUMENT_BADI Method MB_DOCUMENT_BEFORE_UPDATE

entry.title: Re: Negative value not allowed for depreciation area 93
entry.content: Hi Markus, Case 389502/2025 created. Hope to hear from you soon and thanks for your support on this one. Br, Marina

entry.title: Re: Sales Return Copy Data
entry.content:
Hello,

Please clarify what exactly should happen for these two divisions - should items assigned to these divisions be excluded from the returns sales order at all? In my opinion, the best way to meet this requirement is to create a new copying requirement routine and assign it in copy control between the billing document and the return sales order at the item level. In the new routine, you can check the division and set the relevant value in BP_SUBRC.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Mashup Issue
entry.content:
You have to probably maintain view V_T582ITVCLAS.
Check for updates of this table for your country in which you are using the garnishments. Renewal has to be delivered by SAP to be able to use mashups. Not all infotypes are still valid.

entry.title: Re: How to define multiple to parent associations in RAP?
entry.content: dude, don't just put the error msg, show you what you did....

entry.title: Datasphere's task chain are not triggered after recent updates on HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

in the last week end an update of HANA Cloud under of Datasphere happens, according to this note https://me.sap.com/notes/3220622/E

We found that in many customers the scheduled task chains are not triggered.

The error seems random and not related to recent Datasphere upgrades about "scheduling with local timezone".

 

Did you experience this? 

are there any SAP notes?

thanks,

Alberto

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements - Prerequisites SAPUI5 version
entry.content:
Try site 

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/

this has option to change the version as per the attachment, you can look into by changing version .other wise you can look into what each version has 

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/6660a59a8a22460a91fe65a0d96a567e

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2305+ : send push notification when Work Order is unassigned from user
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community

For SAP Service and Asset Manager 2305+, there is the requirement to send push notification to iOS device when a Work Order is unassigned from end user.

My questions are:

- Can this functionality be achieved with out of the box SSAM 2305 version and higher?

- If customizations are needed, are the steps below making sense?

1. define custom ABAP class handler for PUSH oMDO, with custom assignment logic (to query the subject user)

2. under configpanel, specify the above Z class to the PUSH oMDO and PUSH scenarios

3. under configpanel, specify desired fields and filters for the PUSH exchange object

Any inputs and comments are appreciated.

Thanks, Jinlin

entry.title: Cannot log into AI Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi 

I am having trouble logging into AI Launchpad. I am following this: Use Boosters for Free Tier Use of SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad | SAP Tutorials because I want to attempt this: Chatbot Development Made Easy with SAP AI Core and Build Apps 

I've done everything exactly the same using the free tier of BTP (not trial) and even tried other regions for the sub account. When trying to access the launchpad, I get to the login screen which says I cannot be authenticated. When I click forget password it doesn't send me a reset link leading to me thinking it can't find an account with my details.

entry.title: Re: Allowing SAP Support to logon to BTP services when Co...
entry.content:
Hi Andrew

For some services the parameter "?sap_idp=sap.default" added at the end of the URL works. This works for Workzone  (see note https://me.sap.com/notes/2823487/E) and HANA Cloud for example but does not work for Integration Suite or Business App Studio.

Another important point is that depending on how you have configured your principal propagation the default IDP might not work. This specific IDP uses mail as mandatory attribute for login name so if you're using a different attribute in your scenario it seems not possible to configure.

Hope to hear other thoughts from the community on this.

Diego

entry.title: Re: Generate CAP Project in BAS with Error @sap/hdi-deploy@5.4.2 Not Match
entry.content: If we execute npm install -g hana-cli it still gives error

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content: Thanks for the hint. Maybe this a part of the problem. Unfortunately I am not able to test on dedicated hardware.

entry.title: Re: What configuration need to CHECK PRINT in SAP S4HANA...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for trusting the SAP Community to ask your question here.

An answer has already been brought to your issue in the link below :

Check Printing in SAP S4 Hana Cloud 

Could you please check it and see if it solves your issue ?

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: There is an API for calling GETPDF for a billing Docu...
entry.content:
Hello,

In the API documentation, you can find the information that this is expected behavior:

"When a billing document has multiple output items containing a PDF, the service always fetches the newest PDF across all output items in output channels PRINT and EMAIL."

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/03c04db2a7434731b7fe21dca77440da/990f1ce2078f42e4b593d6d060966bd8.html?locale=en-US

I do not think that there is a simple way to change this functionality, especially in the public cloud. 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: EDI PO to SO questions - How to remove segment E1EDKA...
entry.content: Sorry I thought by only entering the material number it should be enough but indeed it needs to be entered in the PO in field IDNLF or in the Info Records. Now I am getting the qualifier correctly determined 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP for Me Portal Latency Issues Again
entry.content: Hi, was there any solution to this? It took me 15 mins and still the page is stuck on 'loading'... other websites open in a split second..

entry.title: Re: Planned order is not getting created for Assemble to...
entry.content:
Hello

Can you please check if SAP Note 3124967 is implemented in your system? If the note is already implemented, then you should open an incident to SAP, as there is a known side-effect of this note that might trigger this error message incorrectly.

Best regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Inside SAP's Own Procurement Transformation with SAP Ariba Category Management
entry.content:
By Lisa Heinrich, Senior Solution Value Advisor, Finance and Spend Management, SAP

I recently tuned in to the Procurement Leaders’ session, “Leveraging AI for Category Management,” featuring Nouh Abed Assad, COO of SAP’s Global Procurement Organization, hosted by Ian Lawless from Procurement Leaders and joined by Barri Horn, SAP’s Director of Product Marketing. I have to say—it was one of the most energizing and eye-opening sessions I’ve attended in a while.

What made it so compelling? It wasn’t a sales pitch. It was SAP pulling back the curtain on how we’re using our own SAP Ariba Category Management tools to transform procurement from the inside out. The honesty, the detail, and the practical insights captured and held my interest from beginning to end.

Nouh shared SAP’s journey methodically and with clarity, showing how a category-driven model supported by AI is helping SAP’s business shift from tactical execution to strategic impact. What resonated most with me was his emphasis on category management as a “living, breathing process”—not just a one-time exercise. It’s about aligning with business goals, understanding market shifts, and tracking outcomes that matter.

Any strong sourcing and procurement organization should have a category plan. But when Nouh described how AI-powered tools like generative segmentation and market dynamics analysis are now part of SAP’s daily procurement playbook, I got excited. These tools aren’t just flashy extras. They help category managers challenge assumptions, spot opportunities, and build smarter, faster strategies that they can share with their stakeholders. As Nouh put it perfectly: “Savings come from doing the right work; AI just helps us do it smarter.”

He also underscored a critical point relevant to adopting new tools: planning, change management, and procurement best practices are non-negotiables. Without structure and team buy-in, even the best tools often fail to gain traction with business users. His advice? “You should have implemented it yesterday.” That one stuck with me—I’ve wanted to say that to so many customers I’ve worked with over the years. Honestly, I’ve even thought about putting it on a bumper sticker!

As someone in SAP’s Solution Value Advisory team, I work closely with customers every day help them get the most out of SAP Ariba solutions to drive adoption. Seeing the very strategies and tools I champion brought to life within SAP itself was incredibly validating. Whether I’m leading workshops or helping businesses define their solution value road map, I often point to SAP Ariba Category Management as a critical addition for long-term procurement success.

Why This Matters

Category management—especially when powered by AI—isn’t just about cost savings. It’s about unlocking long-term value, supporting sustainability goals, and strengthening collaboration across the business. This session reinforced how real that value is and how accessible it can be when strategy, technology, and people align.

If you’re pondering where to begin, these tips may help:

  • Standardize your approach.
  • Invest in change management.
  • Start small—but start NOW.

SAP’s story isn’t just a vision—it’s already a rapidly evolving reality. And after watching this session, I’m more energized than ever to help others get there, too. 

Now it’s your turn! Register here today to watch this informative session on demand.

entry.title: Re: Time Series (Trend) chart
entry.content: You could clean past data values which do not seem to be relevant and add additional inputs (note that you need to have values input for the future periods). The model is just sometimes bad because there is no pattern in data. Here in your example, I guess it just proposed a lag1 model.

entry.title: Re: How to activate CDS views that depend on each other?
entry.content:
I have solved the issue by creating a program that forces the CDSs to activate.
You are welcome to read the blog I wrote.

Force mass activation of CDS with dependencies 
https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/force-mass-activation-of-cds-with-dependencies/ba-p/14061133

entry.title: Re: Datasphere's task chain are not triggered after recen...
entry.content:
This is the link to the note:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3589770/E

entry.title: Re: New Intelligent Look Up Feature in SAP Datasphere.

entry.title: Re: creating or updating service instance: Could not update parameters of service "cpaap-xsuaa-
entry.content: Hi, did you find any solution?

entry.title: Report for Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Considering the fiori app Transfer Stock - In-Plant, we have a report for we can check the information of the moviments?

MB52 is just for movement 313, when the material appears in transit.

entry.title: Re: Read archived records from DFKKZP table
entry.content:
This table should be archived with object FI_MKKPAYL (AOBJ, SARA)

  • There is a reload program RFKKZA02
  • Look for documentation at the (ADK) Archive Development Kit - Archive Development Kit BC-CCM-ADK 
  • Look at sample program SBOOKR (read archived data)

entry.title: Re: Remote Code Analysis in ATC – Technical Setup step by step
entry.content:
Hi @KumarAakash ,

why not to use remote ATC?

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Inside SAP's Own Procurement Transformation with SAP Ariba Category Management
entry.content: I'm looking into the issue with the URL and apologize for the inconvenience.

entry.title: Re: Not able to get the workflow instance tasks in my BPA...
entry.content:
There could be several reasons why you are not able to get the workflow instance tasks in your SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) inbox. Here are some steps to help you troubleshoot the issue:

1. Verify Access to My Inbox
Ensure that you are accessing My Inbox correctly based on your role:(https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/d5ecf81f85874a0d83294bc94d8a69b7.html)

Citizen Developers: Access My Inbox from the My Inbox icon in the Lobby. For more information, see
My Inbox for Citizen Developers (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/d5ecf81f85874a0d83294bc94d8a69b7.html)

Process Participants: Access My Inbox from the My Inbox tile in your SAP Build Work Zone home page. For more information, see 
My Inbox for Process Participants

2. Check Task Assignment
Ensure that the tasks are assigned to you. You can view all tasks assigned to you, claim tasks, and process them in My Inbox. For more information, see (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/d5ecf81f85874a0d83294bc94d8a69b7.html)

3. Monitor Workflow Instances
Use the Process and Workflow Instances view to see a list of all workflow instances and act on those instances. For more information, see (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/de40f56efdff44a09724480367803b8b.html)

4. View Tasks of Workflow Instance
To view the tasks of a workflow instance, choose Show Tasks in the instance details. For more information, see
More Options (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/85d7fc5a28584a7d86cc90a86a8a610c.html)

5. Ensure Proper Configuration
Ensure that the workflow is properly configured and deployed. Follow the steps for configuring and deploying the project in a productive environment. For more information, see (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/feae3cea3cc549aaa9d9de7d363a83e6/74a34f8c5bf64c81a5ed13e7f0909be1.html)
Configuring SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: SAP Advantage ODBC drivers
entry.content: I have all drivers for all version. What do you need ?

entry.title: Re: error message: enter a valid currency when running Re...
entry.content:
Finally, the problem was that last time the user run the report he chose a currency that after another user deleted from the "Currencies" table in SAP. So, when the user tried to run the report he could not because the currency of the report was deleted.
The solution was to create the currency again in the "Currencies" table and after that he was able to run the report again.

entry.title: Re: Time Series (Trend) chart
entry.content: @SophieElgharib"The model is just sometimes bad because there is no pattern in data" by this you mean to say forecast works well only when there is a definite pattern in the data? I am just trying to understand. And what is lag1 model? I dont get it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: Error importing project...
entry.content:
To resolve errors encountered when importing a project from another BTP sub-account in SAP Build Process Automation, follow these steps:

  1. Check Prerequisites:

    • Ensure that the project has been exported correctly from the SAP Build Process Automation lobby or SAP Intelligent RPA Studio. The project should be saved as a ZIP file on your local system 
      (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/ca98da78eb1f4d329d82b66ef8baac98.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud)

  2. Import the Project:

    • You can import a project either from your local system or choose from the list of available projects (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/ca98da78eb1f4d329d82b66ef8baac98.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud)

  3. Troubleshoot Automations:

    • If you experience issues related to automations, thoroughly analyze the traces and check your project. Refer to the troubleshooting guide for automation (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/6626409193b84c0cbf8dc0ce996da593.html)

  4. Export Health Metrics:

    • Export health metrics for your agent to identify any underlying issues 
      (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/36593c5253764792b998d6b5e9f60551.html)

  5. Update Destinations for Live Content Packages:

    • If you already use SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Workflow Management and have configured SAP Build Work Zone, update the destination to use Live Content Packages 
      (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/26dbc5ab6b6041f0a02c1c1211611c97.html)

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content:
Hi @kirankumardara, 

It seems there may be a bit of context missing from your description—are you using a multiple customer scenario (e.g. 0S02)? And are your condition records maintained at the Sold-To level with different rebate rates?

If your pricing needs to reflect different rates per Sold-To, but the contract is created at the Bill-To level, then you’ll need to ensure the Sold-To Party is passed to the Settlement Document line items (WBRP).

How to achieve this: 

  • You can do this by using Split Criteria to transfer the Sold-To from the business volume to the line item level of the settlement document.
  • Then, adjust your Access Sequence to include the relevant field where the Sold-To is stored (e.g., custom field or standard if available).
  • Alternatively, there are other ways to influence the pricing determination, such as Transfer Manager logic or custom enhancements, depending on your system setup and flexibility needs.

Regards, 
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: Cannot delete custom Business Function Set - SFW3 (switch framework)
entry.content:
I have created a Business Function Set ZZZ via SFW3, which I used to activate a custom switch (via a business function). Now I want to delete it, the business function is deactivated in SFW5:

But I obtain this error message when deleting:

Deletion is not possible
Business Function Set ZZZ is currently activated system-wide

How can I deactivate it system-wide?

entry.title: Re: How can we get a TADIR entry for any given object in...
entry.content:
Hello @100361466722 ,

Did you try to check from Eclipse-> Open ABAP Development Object-> TADIR? if  you are unable to open and check from TADIR, you must be able to directly check/display the object from Open ABAP Development object. Hope this helps.

Best Regards,

Maciej

entry.title: Re: Build Process Automation API Trigger, Can't Get Defin...
entry.content:
Ensure you have a service key from the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). For more information, see
Create a Service Key for the SAP Build Process Automation Instance


Procedure ( https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/5bdc85433a944b0db47bd3907812c0d8.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud )
Access Control Tower: In SAP Build, choose Control Tower, then select the Environments tile

Select Environment: Select your environment and go to the Triggers view

Add Trigger: Choose Add Trigger, select a project, and choose Next

Select API: Choose API and Next

Configure Trigger Settings: Configure the trigger settings and optionally, the agent attributes. Note that the maximum expiration time is limited to 30 days or 4 weeks. Once the expiration time is passed, the trigger appears in Expired status

Create Trigger: Choose Create. You can now copy the API trigger information and close

Testing the API Trigger
Once the API call is set as your process trigger, you can test the call using Postman. For detailed instructions, ( https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/7ba3a9894ec140368d7c6e944c9ddcbc.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud)

Additional Information
ISO 8601 Format: Ensure date and time are in the ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., 2023-03-16) and hhss (e.g., 1516)

entry.title: Gmail Integration with SAP Build Process Automation (RPA)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working on a custom automation in SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) using the Gmail features from the Google Workspace SDK. My goal is to automate data extraction from Gsheet file attached in Gmail. However, I ran into an issue right at the beginning, when trying to search for the email, the automation fails with the following error:

Error: Please specify user email Id
Exception: irpa_core.error.SequenceError

#Configuration

  • I'm using a Google service account key for authentication.

  • I call the "Google Authorization" activity at the start of the automation. I provided the userEmail generated in the Service Account key, and the authorization is successfully executed without any issue.

  • Search Email query parameter : "subject:" + Step0.searchSubject + " AND from:" + Step0.searchFrom.

  • Domain-wide delegation is configured in Google Admin Console :

   - https://mail.google.com
   - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive
   - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.modify
   - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

Has anyone experienced this? Could there be an internal requirement to pass the userEmail again within the Gmail task itself?

Any help, guidance, or shared experience would be greatly appreciated 🙏
Thanks in advance!
Kais

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements: returning values when doing intent ba...
entry.content:
Hi Robert,

Since Fiori Elements, let us use onAfterSave for smooth back navigation. (link)

this.editFlow.onAfterSave(function() {
    sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation").toExternal({
        target: { semanticObject: "AppA", action: "display" }
    });
});

to be redirected to App A after saving in App B.

Thanks,

Jakes

entry.title: Re: Cannot delete custom Business Function Set - SFW3 (sw...
entry.content:
Go to SFW5, unselect "Business Function Set" and click the button "Activate Changes" as shown here:

Now you can delete the custom business function set.

NB: for information, the current business function set is stored in the table SFW_ACTIVE_B1, with version = "A". If the concerned set is still in this table, the error message is sent.

entry.title: Re: How to enable texts to be displayed on the purchase order outputs?
entry.content:
@SivaKumarSeelam Thanks for that explanation.

I have a question regarding the deletion of settings: Is it possible to the delete entries from SSCUI 104689 (Define Texts for Contract)?

We are currently printing some notes fields that should only be internal, however i see no possibility to revert that entry.

Best regards,
Kerisha

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements: returning values when doing intent ba...
entry.content:
and with parameters:-

var oCrossAppNav = sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation");
oCrossAppNav.toExternal({
    target: { semanticObject: "AppA", action: "display" },
    params: {
        objectId: "12345",
        draftId: "67890",
        mode: "edit"
    }
});

entry.title: Re: How to create an event in SAP Build Automation to cal...
entry.content:
To create an event in SAP Build Process Automation that calls a REST iFlow in the cloud, follow these steps:

Prerequisites
Ensure the following prerequisites are met: (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/9e171a2f1af943438167fb1ba194c862.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud)

Your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system is available and connected with SAP Build Process Automation, and is able to receive all required notification events. For more information, see
Enable the Consumption of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Events

You have set up an SAP Event Mesh service instance in your SAP BTP cockpit subaccount. For more information, see
Setting Up SAP Event Mesh in BTP Cockpit

You have created your queue and your queue subscriptions. For more information, see
Manage Queues

You have created a webhook subscription to subscribe to an event queue. For more information, see
Manage Queue Subscriptions

You have created a service key. For more information, see
Create a Service Key for the SAP Build Process Automation Instance

Steps to Create an Event Project (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/cb133f94c32d44a690c1718a73008d06.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud)
Create an Event Project:

Use a unified customer landscape to consume APIs from SAP applications, such as SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Ariba, and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, that are registered with a global account in SAP BTP

Configure the Webhook URL:

Fulfill the Webhook URL by using the URL from the instance of the SAP Build Process Automation plan standard Service Key api endpoints and adding internal/be/v1/events. The webhook URL should be as follows: plaintext https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-eu-prod.cfapps.sap.hana.ondemand.com/internal/be/v1/events
Insert the Client ID, Client Secret, and Token URL by adding oauth/token to the latter. Copy and paste these credentials from the service key

Create a Consumer Queue:

Create a consumer queue with appropriate topic subscriptions to capture which events from SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh reach SAP Build Process Automation. For more information, see
Configuring Queues (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/623365f5e0b24e8c9d500ffe37f36a83.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud)

Create a Custom REST Delivery Point:

Use the information in the event to call the API and start the business process

Create a REST Consumer:

Inside the new REST connector, which requires the credentials from an SAP Build Process Automation service instance. For more information, see
Creating a REST Connector

Create a Queue Binding:

Enter the POST Request Target to create a queue binding.
Enter the Request headers if created, so that the queue binding won't fail.
Enter the Content-Type, for example, application/cloudevents+json.
Enter the string that identifies the SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh instance in WebHook-Request-Origin, for example, "aem, prod-aem"

Next Steps
You can consume the published events in your process. For more information, see
Create an Event to Start a Process (https://help.sap.com/docs/PROCESS_AUTOMATION/a331c4ef0a9d48a89c779fd449c022e7/11f18c7c07c14cde953af17f8521ff6f.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud)


By following these steps, you can successfully create an event in SAP Build Process Automation to call a REST iFlow in the cloud.

entry.title: Re: How to activate CDS views that depend on each other?
entry.content:
Hi Hauke,

Marking a view as "experimental" sometimes bypasses dependency issues(link)

@ObjectModel.usageType.serviceQuality: #X
define view Z_CompositionGrandchildView as select from Z_CompositionChildView { ... };

Thanks,

Jakes

entry.title: Re: Instance Feature Control of a field in Action button...
entry.content:
Hello @ankahit ,

Could you clarify are you trying use Action: Features - Instance ? or you can directly write your logic in custom save functionality.

Best Regards,

Maciej

entry.title: Where can I learn processes and tools for effective sourcing within the SAP S/4HANA environment?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring Sourcing in S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
This course provides participants with an overview of the sources of supply available in SAP S/HANA, and presents the processes and tools necessary for effective sourcing within the SAP S/4HANA environment.

Learning objectives
​After completing this learning journey, Business Users will be able to use special purchasing information records, the source list, and quota arrangements, and describe the different options for determining the source of supply.
This course equips users with the skills needed to perform sourcing processes and drive organizational efficiency.

Prerequisites 

  • Exploring Contract Management in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Best Approach for Scheduled Trigger with User Credent...
entry.content: This solution is actually very viable, since the user can change the credential as he wishes without interrupting the flow. Thank you Manish !

entry.title: Re: Joule Setup / Error during Booster Execution
entry.content:
Hi Lukas,

When you setup Joule for the Public Cloud, you work everything within one BTP sub-account. You will create one Joule and one Work Zone instance under the sub-account. When you have entitlements in two separate accounts, how can you put instances under one sub-account?

I haven't seen this error message before, seems quite complicated. Can you try to work everything under one sub-account first?

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content: Hello @michael_thinschmidt , Thanks for the feedback , the flag is deactivated and the system anyway didn't allow both flags to be activated together

entry.title: Re: SAC - currency conversion across three currencies
entry.content:
@eric2357 

Currently FX Rate triangulation is not supported as pointed by you. There is a influence request for this feature but its under long term consideration so no set date for availability. You can upvote it so that it gets enough votes and traction to be picked up by Product development team.

Derive exchange rate for missing currency combination from a different combination in currency table

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Can we Provide an Object For Attribute as Associated...
entry.content:
Hello @Anoop_L ,

If I understand the question right, you want to store the object reference of a class in an attribute? If this is the case then yes you can. Instantiate the object within the class and pass the reference to the attribute defined.

Best Regards,

Maciej
